远景首发AIDC能源解决方案，已携手腾讯落地全球首个100%绿电直供数据中心
china.description: 36氪获悉，4月1日，远景正式发布AIDC从"芯"到“网”多场景能源解决方案，覆盖电网侧、场站侧、负荷侧和控制侧，高效破解AI算力时代数据中心的电力瓶颈。据了解，远景已与腾讯在内蒙古赤峰落地了全球首个100%绿电直供的数据中心，综合能源成本降低超40%，年减少碳排放可达18万吨。

china.title: “橡鹿机器人”完成3亿元融资
china.description: 36氪获悉，“橡鹿机器人”今日宣布完成3亿元融资，由亦庄国投管理的产业升级基金领投，琥珀、九安、海棠跟投。这是继源码、IDG、腾讯、京东后，橡鹿再度获得重磅机构加持。

Abstract: The efficiency of game engines and policy optimization algorithms is crucial for training reinforcement learning (RL) agents in complex sequential decision-making tasks, such as Tetris. Existing Tetris implementations suffer from low simulation speeds
papers.author: Xingguo Chen, Pingshou Xiong, Zhenyu Luo, Mengfei Hu, Xinwen Li, Yongzhou L\"u, Guang Yang, Chao Li, Shangdong Yang

papers.author: In-Chang Baek, Jiyun Jung, Sung-Hyun Kim, Geum-Hwan Hwang, Kyung-Joong Kim

papers.author: Helena L\"ofstr\"om, Tuwe L\"ofstr\"om, Anders Hjort, Fatima Rabia Yapicioglu

papers.author: Fabrizio De Santis, Gyunam Park, Wil M. P. van der Aalst

Abstract: Art. 50 II of the EU Artificial Intelligence Act mandates dual transparency for AI-generated content: outputs must be labeled in both human-understandable and machine-readable form for automated verification. This requirement, entering into force in A
papers.author: Vera Schmitt, Niklas Kruse, Premtim Sahitaj, Julius Sch\"oning

papers.author: Nikil Ravi, Kexing Ying, Vasilii Nesterov, Rayan Krishnan, Elif Uskuplu, Bingyu Xia, Janitha Aswedige, Langston Nashold

papers.title: When Verification Hurts: Asymmetric Effects of Multi-Agent Feedback in Logic Proof Tutoring

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for automated tutoring, but their reliability in structured symbolic domains remains unclear. We study step-level feedback for propositional logic proofs, which require precise symbolic reasoning alig
papers.author: Tahreem Yasir (DK), Sutapa Dey Tithi (DK), Benyamin Tabarsi (DK), Dmitri Droujkov (DK), Sam Gilson Yasitha Rajapaksha (DK), Xiaoyi Tian (DK), Arun Ramesh (DK),  DongKuan (DK),  Xu, Tiffany Barnes

papers.author: Sambartha Ray Barman, Andrey Starenky, Sofia Bodnar, Nikhil Narasimhan, Ashwin Gopinath

papers.author: Xiaoyang Wang, Christopher C. Yang
